title: Cobblemon Exp. All
description: Adds Exp. All from Pokémon to Cobblemon
body:
**This mod is a beta version; stay tuned for upcoming updates.**

# Cobblemon Exp. All

## Now in Cobblemon, gaining experience is easier than ever!

This mod adds the iconic and super-useful Exp. All item from the Pokémon games directly to Cobblemon for Minecraft.

With Exp. All enabled, your Pokémon gain experience more efficiently, even when they're not actively battling. By default, the percentage of EXP each Pokémon receives from Exp. All is 50%, but this value can be easily modified by editing the mod's configuration file.

### How it works:

- The player simply needs to carry the Exp. All item in their inventory.
- The effect is passive: as long as you have the item with you, all your Pokémon benefit from the experience bonus.
- It doesn't need to be equipped on a specific Pokémon; it works for the entire team as long as the item is in your inventory!

### Key features:

- Experience sharing true to the classic Pokémon system.
- Fully customizable settings (EXP percentage).
- Compatible with the current Cobblemon mechanics.
- Ideal for trainers who want to level up their entire team faster without sacrificing the fun.

Whether you're exploring caves, participating in epic battles, or simply raising your perfect team, Cobblemon Exp. All makes the training process much more convenient and rewarding.
